draft.subject: Automating your bearing supply quotes
draft.body:
Hi Robert,

I work with industrial suppliers like Northwest Bearing to automate their quote process. Instead of your team manually pulling specs and pricing for each customer request, an AI system handles the intake and generates accurate quotes in minutes.

For bearing suppliers especially—where margin depends on speed—this cuts response time from hours to less than 30 seconds. Customers feel the difference, so do your win rates.

Worth a quick call to see what this could look like for your operation?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced industrial bearing supply industry, local Oklahoma location (Woodward), pain points around quote turnaround and customer win rates
